description.ko: AURA-7 오가닉 플로우는 자연과 디지털 인공물의 완벽한 연결을 탐구합니다. 심해 생물의 우아한 움직임과 바람이 스치는 풍경을 모방한 유동적이고 리드미컬한 패턴을 통해 고요하고 연속적인 움직임을 전달합니다.
description.en: AURA-7 Organic Flow explores the seamless connection between nature and digital artifice. It features fluid, rhythmic patterns that mimic the graceful movement of deep-sea organisms and wind-swept landscapes, creating a sense of serene, continuous motion.

prompt: Cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, organic fluid motion, liquid silk textures flowing in zero gravity, soft iridescent color palette, pearlescent glow with bioluminescent veins, abstract architectural curves inspired by natural anatomy, high-speed macro photography, ethereal atmosphere, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic lighting
